title: Golden Algerian Chicken Wings Skewers
description: Tangy, crispy chicken wings skewers infused with Algerian spices and a hint of lemon, perfect for a shojin-friendly meal.
instructions: Trim any excess fat from wings and pat dry with paper towels.
Whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, cumin, paprika, coriander, cayenne, salt, and pepper to form a marinad.
Toss wings in the marinad until fully coated, then let rest for 10 minutes at room temp.
Thread 4 wings onto each of 4 skewers, leaving small gaps between.
Brush grill with a little oil to prevent sticking.
Place skewers on the grill and cook 10-12 minutes, turning every 3 minutes, until wings are golden and reach internal temp of 165 F.
Remove from grill and let rest 5 minutes.
Sprinkle chopped parsley over the skewers before serving.
Serve hot with a side of lemon wedges and a sprinkle of extra parsley.
